auditor: Claude — systematic file-by-file audit against live tool get_tools() registries
audit_notes: All tool names verified against actual get_tools() implementations. Key disambiguation: bb7_memory_insights (memory_tool.py, composite stats+BM25 summary) vs bb7_memory_get_insights (memory_interconnect.py, pure BM25 concept network report) are distinct tools — both valid, different scopes. All bb7_exo_* references in pre-existing workflows confirmed present in exoskeleton_tool.py get_tools(). All bb7_journal_* references confirmed present in thought_journal_tool.py get_tools(). Unresolved tools tracked in unresolved_tool_references — all expected in session_manager_tool.py or other unaudited files. | 2026-04-08: Removed thought_journal_tool (11 tools). Added lisan subsystems: DistillationSubsystem, CognitiveJournalSubsystem. 3 new tools: bb7_lisan_recall, bb7_lisan_distill, bb7_lisan_intend. Added 3 new workflows: lisan_recall, lisan_distill, lisan_intend. | 2026-04-09: Confirmed enhanced_web_tool.py exists but NOT registered in mcp_server.py — uses aiohttp async, same sovereign data dir pattern, has enhanced features (SEO analysis, webpage analysis) but not integrated. Added distillation pipeline integration notes.

distillation_integration.description: Telemetry flywheel for RFT data capture
distillation_integration.forward_path: Scored trajectories feed into fine-tuning dataset for behavioral cloning

architecture_notes.sovereign_data_dir: /home/daeron/Somnus-MCP/data/ — single source of truth for all persistent state. Override via SOVEREIGN_DATA_DIR env var. All tools write here. Subdirectories: memory_store.json, thought_journal.json, journal_index.json, journal_memory_index.json, planner/planner_runs.jsonl, planner/planner_state.json, agents/messages/{channel}.jsonl, exoskeleton/active_plans.json, exoskeleton/cross_ai_activity.jsonl, web_cache/
architecture_notes.atomic_writes: All disk writes use temp-file-then-os.replace() pattern across all tool files. Windows-safe retry loop (8 attempts) for transient PermissionError/winerror 5/32 in memory_tool.py.
architecture_notes.golden_paths_circular: ExoskeletonTool reads this file on init and seeds chain_priors (Bayesian alpha/beta per workflow name) from it. Improving golden_paths.json directly improves routing intelligence on next server start. This file is both documentation and executable configuration.
architecture_notes.bm25_implementations: Three independent BM25 engines: (1) MemoryInterconnectionEngine — canonical, Okapi BM25 k1=1.5 b=0.75 Robertson-Sparck Jones IDF, persistent indices, 4-pass force_rebuild(). (2) EnhancedMemoryTool — loads MemoryInterconnectionEngine as sub-engine with graceful fallback stub. (3) ThoughtJournalTool — self-contained lightweight BM25 implementation, same k1/b, explicitly NOT importing memory_interconnect to avoid circular dependency.
architecture_notes.session_boundary_survival: Three independent systems persist reasoning across session boundaries: (1) memory_tool.py — what was stored. (2) thought_journal_tool.py — why decisions were made. (3) exoskeleton_tool.py — what the optimal tool chains are. Together they eliminate AI amnesia.
architecture_notes.multi_ai_plane: openrouter_agent_tool.py agents (planner/debugger/analyzer/doc) publish to data/agents/messages/{channel}.jsonl. exoskeleton_tool.py appends cross-AI activity to data/exoskeleton/cross_ai_activity.jsonl. bb7_exo_get_recent_activity reads this log for coordination. Multiple AI instances can share the same sovereign data plane.
architecture_notes.tool_naming_convention: All tools prefixed bb7_. Tool source files: memory_ prefix = memory_tool.py or memory_interconnect.py (check exact name — they overlap). exo_ prefix = exoskeleton_tool.py. journal_ prefix = thought_journal_tool.py. agent_ prefix = openrouter_agent_tool.py. planner_ prefix = openrouter_planner_tool.py. fetch_/search_/download_/check_url_/extract_ prefixes = web_tool.py.
architecture_notes.three_tier_planning: Planning operates on three tiers: (1) bb7_planner_plan — LLM-reasoned structured plan (human-readable steps with why/acceptance/risk). (2) bb7_exo_plan — Bayesian beam-search tool chain selection (3 variants: balanced/fast/deep). (3) bb7_agent_run with agent_type=planner — autonomous agent that iterates and calls real tools. These are complementary, not competing.

memory_tool.py.description: SOTA++ hierarchical persistent memory. MemGPT-style LRU working buffer + BM25 interconnect + Ebbinghaus decay scoring. Sovereign data dir: /home/daeron/Somnus-MCP/data/memory_store.json

memory_interconnect.py.description: Okapi BM25 retrieval engine (k1=1.5, b=0.75, Robertson-Sparck Jones IDF). Persistent BM25 indices in data/. Provides concept network, clustering, and gap detection. Loaded as sub-engine by memory_tool.py but also exposes its own MCP tools.

openrouter_agent_tool.py.description: Distributed cognitive execution plane. Agents (planner, debugger, analyzer, doc) run via OpenRouter API, call real MCP tools, publish/subscribe through shared /home/daeron/Somnus-MCP/data/agents/ message bus, and hand off to each other. Node state persisted per-run. Default model: qwen/qwen3.5-plus-02-15. Env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_AGENT_MODEL.

web_tool.py.description: Async HTTP via aiohttp. Search uses DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API (not SerpAPI). Cache stored in data/web_cache/. Session is loop-aware and recreates on loop switch. Max fetch size 10MB.

enhanced_web_tool.py.description: ENHANCED VERSION — NOT REGISTERED in mcp_server.py. Has additional features: bb7_fetch_url (with metadata analysis), bb7_search_web (multiple engines), bb7_analyze_webpage (SEO, structure, accessibility analysis), bb7_download_file (with security checks). Uses async aiohttp, follows same SOVEREIGN_DATA_DIR pattern. Exists in tree but not integrated.

exoskeleton_tool.py.description: Control-plane routing and orchestration layer. Reads golden_paths.json on init and seeds Bayesian chain_priors from it — this file is both documentation and executable routing configuration. Tool catalog built from tool_manifest.json, live-synced via attach_live_tools_provider() / sync_from_live_tools(). TF-IDF built over tool descriptions for semantic scoring. Scoring formula: 0.40×semantic + 0.20×intent_match + 0.15×composability + 0.15×reliability − 0.10×latency_penalty + momentum_bonus (cap 0.25). Session momentum: online-learned category transition matrix normalized after each tool call. Category graph: 11 categories (exoskeleton, memory, sessions, project_context, analysis, execution, web, files, visual, system, misc) with adjacency expansion. Beam search generates 3 plan variants: balanced / fast / deep. All plans checkpointed to data/exoskeleton/active_plans.json — survive process restart. CRITICAL NOTE: bb7_workspace_context_loader is hardcoded as chain preamble in _make_plans() but NOT registered in this file's get_tools() — source file TBD (tracked in unresolved_tool_references). Data dir: /home/daeron/Somnus-MCP/data/exoskeleton/

openrouter_planner_tool.py.description: Focused LLM plan-generation tool. NOT an agent execution plane — generates a structured JSON execution plan (summary + steps with title/why/actions/acceptance/risk + handoff_template) via OpenRouter chat completions. Complementary to openrouter_agent_tool.py (which executes tools) and exoskeleton_tool.py (which routes and orchestrates). Fallback model chain: qwen/qwen3.5-plus-02-15 → claude-3.5-sonnet → gpt-4o-mini → gemini-2.0-flash-exp:free → mimo-v2-flash:free. Hard gate on OPENROUTER_API_KEY (raises PlannerNotConfiguredError, no mock plans). Default temperature 0.2 (deterministic). Persistence: data/planner/planner_runs.jsonl (per-run telemetry) + data/planner/planner_state.json (aggregate stats). Atomic writes. Loop-aware aiohttp session. Env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY (required), OPENROUTER_PLANNER_MODEL (optional override), OPENROUTER_BASE_URL, OPENROUTER_APP_NAME, OPENROUTER_SITE_URL.

plan_output_schema.steps: array of {id, title, why, actions: [string], acceptance: string, risk: string}

thought_journal_tool.py.description: Structured Reasoning and Decision Provenance System. Captures the *why* behind actions, not just the actions themselves — answers 'why did we make this decision?', 'what alternatives were considered?', 'what actually happened?'. Solves AI amnesia by creating a durable reasoning trail that survives session boundaries. Two entry categories: ThoughtEntry (5 subtypes: thought/insight/hypothesis/observation/question) and DecisionEntry (status: active/validated/invalidated/superseded). Self-contained BM25 engine (k1=1.5, b=0.75) — explicitly NOT importing memory_interconnect to avoid circular dependency. 1.5x recency boost on entries from last 7 days. Conflict detection via BM25 similarity + negation-word heuristic. Reverse map (memory_key → entry_ids) enables 'why was this memory created?' queries. Thread-safe (threading.Lock). Atomic writes. Persistence: data/thought_journal.json + data/journal_index.json + data/journal_memory_index.json.

extraction_note.reason: golden_paths.json is executable routing configuration; metadata/audit prose must not enter Lisan spectral matching or chain-prior seeding.
extraction_note.runtime_doctrine: Somnus-MCP is a 24/7 autonomous neural-symbolic cognition server; MCP/stdio/SSE/HTTPS are transport surfaces only.
